meaning: n.翻覆,翻折,半圆卷饼,流通量,营业额,周转adj.有一部分翻转的,可翻转的
examples: We have a fast turnover of stock.
Our turnover actually increased last year.
Tax efficiency is super high because fund has little turnover and only small dividend income.
The Schwab no-load has a slightly lower expense ratio (35 basis points) and a higher turnover (27%).
